criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on major app stores like Google Play and Apple App Store.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across major app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, App Annie

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI features such as automated budgeting, spending predictions, and personalized financial advice.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Security Features
criteria.description: Strength of security measures including encryption, multi-factor authentication, and data privacy policies.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, security audit reports, user reviews

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use, intuitiveness, and overall design quality of the app interface.
criteria.sources: User reviews, design awards, tech blogs

criteria.name: Functionality
criteria.description: Range and depth of features offered, including budgeting tools, investment tracking, bill reminders, and more.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, feature comparison articles

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: Quality and responsiveness of customer support services.
criteria.sources: User reviews, customer support ratings, official support channels

criteria.name: Integration
criteria.description: Ability to integrate with other financial services, banks, and third-party apps.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, integration partnerships, user reviews
